assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 5 shows: 'git checkout TC-9005 / git pull / git checkout -b TC-9205'. Explicitly notes 'Check out the feature branch TC-9005 (the parent feature branch, not main)'.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 shows: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --head TC-9205'. Final note explicitly states: '--base TC-9005 targets the feature branch, not main'.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 5 shows 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. Step 1 table shows 'Issue Key | TC-9205' and 'Target Branch | TC-9005'. The plan explicitly distinguishes: 'Target Branch value: TC-9005... The task branch will be named TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 4 inspects all 3: (1) migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs for migration pattern, (2) entity/src/advisory.rs to verify status column absence, (3) migration/src/lib.rs for migration registration pattern.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 commit command includes "--trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code'".

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md commit message: 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' (type=feat, scope=migration). Footer contains 'Implements TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md header: 'Target Branch: TC-9005 (feature branch — extracted from "Target Branch" section of task description)'. Step 1 table: 'Target Branch | TC-9005'.
